homepage.meta_description: Official website of Lee Dillon MP for Newbury. Find updates on local campaigns, events, and how Lee is supporting our community.
headings: h2: My focus is on addressing the key challenges faced by our community. From tackling the NHS crisis to ensuring our children receive the education they deserve, I’m working hard to improve local services, protect our environment, and support those hit hardest by the cost-of-living crisis. Together, we can build a better future for Newbury.

h2: The Government Must Listen to Rural Communities
homepage.text_excerpt: --> Home | Lee Dillon MP for Newbury top of page Lee Dillon, MP for Newbury Newsletter sign up About Lee Latest from Lee Priorities Cost-of-Living Crisis Education & SEND Housing NHS Rural Economy Sewage & Flooding In Parliament Campaign & Policy Responses Links & Resources Events Contact More Use tab to navigate through the menu items. Lee Dillon, MP for Newbury I'm Lee Dillon, the Liberal Democrat Member of Parliament for Newbury. Here, you can find my latest news, information, campaigns, updates, and more. ​ I'm here to help, so please don't hesitate to get in touch. ​ lee.dillon.mp@parliament.uk Latest News Contact Me IMG_3047 53987297516_227bda9fd5_o Lee Dillon kayaking with Berkshire Youth IMG_3047 1/13 As the Liberal Democrat MP for Newbury, I am dedicated to championing the values of fairness, community, and opportunity for all. I am honoured to represent Newbury in Westminster, and I will work tirelessly to ensure that the voices of our residents are heard and acted upon. My Priorities My focus is on addressing the key challenges faced by our community. From tackling the NHS crisis to ensuring our children receive the education they deserve, I’m working hard to improve local services, protect our environment, and support those hit hardest by the cost-of-living crisis. Together, we can build a better future for Newbury. NHS Fighting for improved access to GPs, pharmacies, & NHS dentists, reducing waiting times, & better healthcare for all. ​ ​ Flooding & Sewage Protecting our rivers and homes from flooding and sewage pollution by holding the water companies to account. ​ ​ Rural Economy Championing our rural way of life. From backing farmers and the racing industry to improving road safety and connectivity, I am ensuring our villages are heard in Westminster. SEND & Education Championing better resources and opportunities for all children, especially those with special educational needs. ​ Housing Pushing for secure, affordable homes for all, with a focus on housing access, rental protections, and sustainable development. Cost-of-Living Helping families struggling with rising costs, energy bills, and inflation by pushing for fairer solutions and local support. ​ Latest News A Decade of Dead Slow: Milestone Event Ten years on, Dead Slow is saving lives, but we must keep the momentum up to make the roads safer for horses and riders. Social Media Restrictions: A Promise Made, But Much More to Do After cross-party pressure, I am cautiously optimistic at the progress made, but ministers must now provide clearer details and timelines on protections to keep children safe online. The Government Must Listen to Rural Communities Our rural communities provide essential services, but they are increasingly being threatened by poor policy decisions. Universal Credit Support In Parliament, I raised the case of a constituent repeatedly let down by Universal Credit, illustrating the clear need for a welfare system built on dignity and accessibility. ALL NEWS lee.dillon.mp@parliament.uk 01635 243510 Promoted by West Berkshire & Newbury Liberal Democrats on behalf of Lee Dillon MP. pages.title: About Lee | Lee Dillon MP
pages.meta_description: Lee Dillon is the Liberal Democrat MP for Newbury. Find out more about his background, experience, and dedication to serving the community and delivering positive change.
headings: h3: In addition to legislative responsibilities, Lee Dillon actively engages with local organisations and individuals to understand their needs and collaborates on initiatives that aim to enhance the overall well-being of the Newbury community.
pages.text_excerpt: --> About Lee | Lee Dillon MP top of page Lee Dillon, MP for Newbury Newsletter sign up About Lee Latest from Lee Priorities Cost-of-Living Crisis Education & SEND Housing NHS Rural Economy Sewage & Flooding In Parliament Campaign & Policy Responses Links & Resources Events Contact More Use tab to navigate through the menu items. About Lee Lee Dillon was elected as the MP for Newbury in July 2024, following a long-standing commitment to serving his community. A lifelong resident of Thatcham, where his family runs a local pub, Lee went to school in both Thatcham and Newbury. His deep roots in the area fuel his passion for making a positive impact locally. ​ Lee began his political journey in 2007, when he was first elected to the local council. Over the years, he has taken on multiple leadership roles, culminating in becoming Council Leader in May 2023, after the Liberal Democrats took control. His work has always focused on improving local services, infrastructure, and opportunities for the people he represents. ​ Inspired by the late Liberal Democrat MP for Newbury, David Rendel, Lee brings a similar drive and dedication to his role. Prior to becoming an MP, he worked for a not-for-profit housing association, where he helped provide homes to those in need. His priorities as MP include addressing the cost-of-living crisis, supporting families, and ensuring fair access to services. Lee has been a vocal advocate for free school meal support during holidays and fought to save the local ReadiBus service from Conservative cuts. ​ Outside of politics, Lee is a passionate sports fan. He regularly takes his young children to watch Reading Football Club and counts watching his hometown team, Thatcham Town, win at Wembley in the 2018 FA Vase Final as one of his favourite sporting moments. ​ Lee is committed to representing the people of Newbury with energy and focus, always aiming to improve lives and opportunities for all. Member of Parliament, Newbury July 2024 - Present Lee Dillon is the voice of Newbury in the House of Commons, working tirelessly to address key issues and contribute to the development of effective policies for the betterment of the constituency. Community Engagement Local Initiatives and Advocacy In addition to legislative responsibilities, Lee Dillon actively engages with local organisations and individuals to understand their needs and collaborates on initiatives that aim to enhance the overall well-being of the Newbury community. lee.dillon.mp@parliament.uk 01635 243510 Promoted by West Berkshire & Newbury Liberal Democrats on behalf of Lee Dillon MP. pages.title: Priorities | Lee Dillon MP
pages.meta_description: Lee Dillon’s key priorities as MP for Newbury include tackling the cost-of-living crisis, the NHS, improving housing, education, and local infrastructure.
pages.text_excerpt: --> Priorities | Lee Dillon MP top of page Lee Dillon, MP for Newbury Newsletter sign up About Lee Latest from Lee Priorities Cost-of-Living Crisis Education & SEND Housing NHS Rural Economy Sewage & Flooding In Parliament Campaign & Policy Responses Links & Resources Events Contact More Use tab to navigate through the menu items. Priorities NHS Improving access to GPs, pharmacies, and dental services for all constituents. Cost-of-Living Crisis Protecting homes and local environments by addressing chronic flooding and sewage problems. Flooding & Sewage Supporting those hardest hit by rising costs, with a focus on affordability, fair wages, and household bills. SEND & Education Championing high-quality education for every child, and pushing for specialised support for students with Special Educational Needs and Disabilities (SEND). Housing Ensuring secure, affordable homes for all, with a focus on housing access, rental protections, and sustainable development. Rural Economy Standing up for rural communities in farming and food security to equestrian road safety.Backing local farmers, supporting the horse racing industry, fighting for better rural connectivity, and ensuring villages and countryside voices are heard loud and clear in Westminster. lee.dillon.mp@parliament.uk 01635 243510 Promoted by West Berkshire & Newbury Liberal Democrats on behalf of Lee Dillon MP.
